---
title: "Home"
---

::: hero-section
# Open Methods Hub

**Design, execute, and communicate original research in mass media.**

Your central hub for MC 451 and MC 501 --- textbook, workbook, tools, and resources in one place.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Quick Start

::::: card-grid
::: card
### New Student? Start Here

Complete your workspace setup and download your Methods Vault.

[Get Started](setup.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: card
### R Workbook

Seven chapters with narrated video walkthroughs --- from codebook to published portfolio.

[Open Workbook](workbook/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: card
### Methods Vault

Download your Obsidian workspace --- journals, project folders, and offline textbook chapters.

[Get the Vault](methods-vault.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::

::: card
### View Syllabus

Course policies, the 17-week schedule, and grading for MC 451 or MC 501.

[MC 451](syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## The Five Phases

Over one semester, you build a complete content analysis from scratch --- qualitative immersion through quantitative testing --- using real media data.

| Phase | Title | Weeks | Points | Focus |
|-------|-------|-------|--------|-------|
| **I** | [**The Journalist**](modules/01_journalist/index.qmd) | 1--15 | 150 | Reading journals, critical thinking, GitHub setup |
| **II** | [**The Architect**](modules/02_architect/index.qmd) | 2--4 | 125 | Software setup, archive research, project planning |
| **III** | [**The Builder**](modules/03_builder/index.qmd) | 5--12 | 250 | Ethics, theory, codebook, sampling, pilot testing |
| **IV** | [**The Analyst**](modules/04_analyst/index.qmd) | 13--15 | 225 | R programming: wrangling, visualization, inference |
| **V** | [**The Publisher**](modules/05_publisher/index.qmd) | 16--17 | 250 | Final web portfolio: PDF + GitHub Pages |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## The Ecosystem

Four tools work together throughout the course. Each serves a distinct role.

| Tool | What It Does | When You Use It |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| [**Methods Vault**](methods-vault.qmd) | Obsidian workspace for journals, notes, and project files | Every week --- your personal research archive |
| [**R Workbook**](workbook/index.qmd) | Hands-on R tutorials with narrated videos | Phases III--V --- learning R for data analysis |
| [**coursepackR**](resources/index.qmd) | R package that delivers weekly assignment templates and data | Every week --- `download_week("mc451", N)` in R |
| [**Textbook**](textbook-preview.qmd) | *From Vibes to Variables* (2nd Edition, 22 chapters) | Every week --- conceptual foundations for each phase |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Coming Fall 2026

:::{.callout-info}
## Textbook Preview Available

The 2nd edition of *From Vibes to Variables* is structured into 22 chapters across 5 parts --- from foundations through publication. [Preview the chapter listing and structure.](textbook-preview.qmd)
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Course Information

**Instructor:** Dr. Alex P. Leith
**Meeting Times:** MW 3:00--4:15 PM
**Office Hours:** MW 10:00--11:30 AM and 1:30--3:00 PM (or by appointment)
**Office:** Dunham Hall 1017

[View Full Syllabus](syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [How It Works](how-it-works.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
